channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish made worse, 22nd May
item.description:
The council were strimmng the green areas yesterday and were just striming through the fly tip rubbish that's was dumped there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holburne Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping Close to Garages, 22nd May
item.description:
Fly Tipping: Two Van Loads of refurbishment material. ONGOING ISSUE. Close to Garages 1, 2. Blocking garages.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly Tipping inside Hackney Housing Building

item.title: Two boxes of rubbish and several bags, 22nd May
item.description:
There's two boxes and bags of rubbish has been fly-tipped today, don't think it wasn't there this morning. There are two cameras facing where the rubbish is by Gatsby house and Petiver Close. I'm hoping with those cameras you can identify the number plate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Petiver Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind Kilburn Park station, 22nd May
item.description:
Mattresses and other stuff lying around for few days now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bristol Walk, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Right behind Kilburn Park station, 22nd May
item.description:
Mattresses and other stuff lying around for few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: By victoria mews communal bins, 22nd May
item.description:
Cardboard boxes left around victoria mews communal bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned bicycle blocking space, 22nd May
item.description:
This bicycle has been abandoned for at least many months and over time it's become more and more mangled and is now blocking a fair bit of space in this bicycle parking spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haberdasher Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting Street Light Bridgehouse Meadows, 22nd May
item.description:
Bridgehouse Meadows Stickets for far-right protest on all street lighta inside the park, see image

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Lovelinch Close, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large broken paving slab, 22nd May
item.description:
The paving slab has lifted out of the ground and has exposed a big hole and trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic park avenue en1, 22nd May
item.description:
Too many large vehicles going through road A10 needs to be blocked off as stated by labour party going into park avenue from a10 people using it as a short cut causing chaos. At least stop extra large lorries as they block side roads with nearby school very dangerous as they cannot see children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Selborne Road. Non-offensive tag on food waste receptacle., 22nd May
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary Safety Barrier, 22nd May
item.description:
It was not removed from the pedestrian way after works were completed. It has been there for longer than month.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Eastern Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin, 22nd May
item.description:
The bin has been overflowing for a week, since it is food waste it started to smell

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Eastern Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severely damaged abandoned Peugeot in Zone Z97 residents parking bay, 22nd May
item.description:
White Peugeot 508 registration GD21 FZC abandoned in permit holders only bay (Zone Z97). Vehicle is severely damaged with collapsed front wheel/front-end damage and appears not roadworthy. It has been left for an extended period and residents cannot access

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at junction of Hill View Drive and Shepherds Lane, 22nd May
item.description:
See summary

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill View Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office chair, 22nd May
item.description:
Dumped outside 119 Marmadon Road. Here overnight I think. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass top table and bucket, 22nd May
item.description:
Been dumped outside 125 Marmadon for a few days. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinet, 22nd May
item.description:
Dumped outside 86 Marmadon Road. Here overnight. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Vehicle abandoned, 22nd May
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle Been here ages Parts have been removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodmead Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and large rug, 22nd May
item.description:
And a few other household items dumped here on Marmadon Road. Blocking pavement access particularly for users of wheelchairs etc. thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
